title: MoreMetals
description: You guessed it! It adds metals!
body:
## MoreMetals

Adds a bunch of metals with special properties into the game:

- Copper (**will be removed in 1.18.x**)
- Steel
- Sapphire
- Ruby
- Citrine
- Chrysolite
- Aquamarine
- Amethyst
- Tourmaline

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack or YouTube video, but **give credit**!

I'm not planning on porting this to Forge, however feel free to make a fork and do so, while giving proper attribution back to the original mod.
